## SECTION A: COOKIE POLICY (Improved Version)

# Cookie Policy

**Effective Date:** [INSERT DATE]

**Last Updated:** [INSERT DATE]

## 1. Introduction

This Cookie Policy explains how iPrego Pte. Ltd. (UEN: [INSERT UEN]) ("Company," "we," "us," or "our") uses cookies and similar tracking technologies when you visit our websites (`[MARKETING_WEB_HOST]`, `[DOCS_WEB_HOST]`) or use the Vouus platform.

This policy should be read together with our [Privacy Policy](/legal/privacy-policy/), which provides more information about how we process personal data.

## 2. What Are Cookies?

**Cookies** are small text files that are placed on your device (computer, smartphone, tablet) when you visit a website. Cookies are widely used to make websites work efficiently, provide analytics, and enable certain features.

**Similar technologies** we may use include:
- **Local storage:** Data stored in your browser that persists after you close it
- **Session storage:** Temporary data stored during a browser session
- **Pixels/web beacons:** Small graphic images used to track page views and user behavior
- **SDKs:** Software development kits in mobile applications

## 3. How We Use Cookies

We use cookies and similar technologies for the following purposes:

| Purpose | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Operation** | Enable core website and platform functionality |
| **Security** | Protect against unauthorized access and fraud |
| **Authentication** | Keep you logged in and recognize returning users |
| **Preferences** | Remember your settings and choices |
| **Analytics** | Understand how users interact with our services |
| **Performance** | Monitor and improve website performance |

## 4. Types of Cookies We Use

### 4.1 Strictly Necessary Cookies

These cookies are essential for the website and platform to function. They cannot be disabled without affecting site functionality.

| Cookie Name | Purpose | Duration | Provider |
|-------------|---------|----------|----------|
| Session cookie (exact name varies by deployment) | User session management | Session | iPrego |
| CSRF token cookie (exact name varies by deployment) | Security (CSRF protection) | Session | iPrego |
| Authentication cookie (exact name varies by deployment) | Authentication state | 7 days | iPrego |
| `cf_clearance` | Security (bot protection) | 1 year | Cloudflare |
| `__cf_bm` | Bot management | 30 minutes | Cloudflare |

**Legal basis:** Legitimate interest / Contractual necessity (these cookies are required for the service to function).

### 4.2 Analytics Cookies

These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our websites by collecting information anonymously or pseudonymously.

| Cookie Name | Purpose | Duration | Provider |
|-------------|---------|----------|----------|
| `_ga` | Google Analytics - User identification | 2 years | Google |
| `_ga_*` | Google Analytics - Session tracking | 2 years | Google |
| `_gid` | Google Analytics - Session identification | 24 hours | Google |
| `ph_*` | PostHog analytics (if enabled) | 1 year | PostHog |

**Legal basis:** Consent (we will ask for your consent before setting analytics cookies).

**Opt-out:** See Section 6 below for how to manage these cookies.

### 4.3 Functional/Preference Cookies

These cookies enable enhanced functionality and personalization.

| Cookie Name | Purpose | Duration | Provider |
|-------------|---------|----------|----------|
| Locale preference cookie (exact name varies by deployment) | Language preference | 1 year | iPrego |
| Theme preference cookie (exact name varies by deployment) | Dark/light mode preference | 1 year | iPrego |
| UI state cookie (exact name varies by deployment) | UI state (sidebar collapsed) | 1 year | iPrego |
| `cookie_consent` | Your cookie consent preferences | 1 year | iPrego |

**Legal basis:** Consent for non-essential preferences; legitimate interest for consent record.

### 4.4 Marketing/Advertising Cookies

Currently, we do not use marketing or advertising cookies on our websites or platform.

If this changes in the future, we will update this policy and request your consent before setting such cookies.

## 5. Third-Party Cookies

Some cookies on our websites are set by third-party services that appear on our pages:

| Third Party | Purp
